## AI Summary

What this TDD specifies. Key technical decisions.

## 1. Architecture

System diagram (Mermaid). Components touched by this feature.

## 2. Data design

Entity / table / class details. Field-level changes.

## 3. Process design

Step-by-step process flow. **Never a single sentence per step.** Pseudocode required on every method.

## 4. Component design

Per-component spec. Per-platform conventions (e.g., F&O Object-IDs EXT-NNN / BDC-NNN, CE solution prefix).

## 5. Cross-component interactions

Sequence diagrams. Event flows. API contracts.

## 6. Error handling

Per-component error scenarios. Retry policies. Compensating actions.

## 7. Performance considerations

Specific to this feature beyond the default NFR targets.

## 8. Security implementation

Privilege model deltas. Authentication / authorisation deltas. Sensitive data handling.

## 9. Test approach

Cross-reference `test-plan/`. Each component â†’ which test suites cover it.

## 10. Deployment notes

Solution / package boundaries. Migration sequence if applicable.

## 11. Traceability

| TS-NN | Implements FR | Tested by TC |
|---|---|---|
| TS-01 | FR-01 | S01-TC-001, S01-TC-002 |

## 12. Issues / Open items

`<TBD>` items roll up here. Each must be resolved before /validate.
